metadata.customer: Commonwealth of Australia as represented by the Department of Defence

pricing_model_detection.summary: The tender is primarily structured around providing personnel resources on a time and materials basis, with a focus on labour rates and capped pricing.
primary_evidence: T&M Services (up to an NTE Price)
proposed Labour Rates for the applicable SFIA skillsets
actual time spent by the Supplier’s Personnel
pricing_model_detection.reasoning: The tender documents consistently emphasize the provision of personnel resources with billing based on time and materials, capped at a Not-To-Exceed (NTE) price. The focus on labour rates, specific roles, and time tracking supports the classification as staff augmentation time and materials.
